messages.content: hey! sorry i kinda disappeared for a few days, life got busy lol
Hey, welcome back! No need to apologize at all - life does that sometimes! 😄 Hope the busy stretch was more good-busy than stressful-busy? What's been going on?
yeah i was out with some friends this weekend, met a few new people too, was a good time

That sounds really fun! There's something great about a weekend where you actually get out and meet new people - it can feel pretty energizing. Did you end up clicking with any of them, or was it more just a good casual vibe for the night?
theres this one person i hit it off with, we've been texting nonstop honestly. kinda excited about it

Ooh that's exciting! That nonstop texting phase where everything feels fresh and interesting is such a good feeling. Is this more of a potential friend thing or are you getting a bit of a romantic vibe from it? 😄
anyway i'll probably be around less now that im seeing them more. just wanted to let you know whats up

That's really sweet of you to check in! But honestly, go enjoy it - new connections like that are worth prioritizing. Hope it keeps going well with them! 😊 You know where to find me if you ever want to chat.
